DAILY GUIDANCE
Lesson 8 • Protecting muscle while appetite is low
Focus on protein at the first meal you can tolerate. Small frequent meals are acceptable on harder days. A short walk and hydration can improve tolerance, but do not force volume if nausea is elevated.
Home Meals Exercise Progress Support Social Settings
Let’s personalise Hearty
A quick setup so your Home screen starts cleanly. Weigh-ins and photos are handled in the Get Started block.
Step 1 of 5

What should we call you?

This is the name Hearty will use on your Home screen.

Step 2 of 5

Goal weight

Only enter this if your doctor has given you a target weight. You can leave it blank.

Step 3 of 5

Medication type

Choose your medication, or skip this if you are not using one yet.

Step 4 of 5

Medication frequency

Not everyone injects once per week, so Hearty should not assume that.

Step 5 of 5

Injection days

Choose the day or days that match your medication schedule.

Which day or days?
